evals.prompt: I have a weekend hackathon starting tomorrow. I want to build an AI travel planner app. Help me plan the project.
evals.expected_output: A project_phases.md with a short, highly focused 48-hour timeline, skipping complex setups and moving straight to functional prototype phases.

evals.prompt: Create a roadmap for a 1-month solo project to build a full-stack SaaS for tracking personal expenses. It needs an AI receipt scanner.
evals.expected_output: A project_phases.md with a 1-month timeline, properly separating design, core API/DB wiring, and the AI feature integration.

evals.prompt: We're launching a new internal dashboard in 2 weeks. Plan out the phases focusing on frontend design first and using mock data.
evals.expected_output: A project_phases.md outlining a 2-week timeline, emphasizing UI/UX design phases and explicitly using mock data for backend APIs.
